name: chain_if_had_no_followers_no_email_list_and_
method: If had no followers, no email list, and no idea what to sell

stages.task: Scan r/passive_income, r/sidehustle, r/Entrepreneur for highest-engagement zero-start threads. Extract: what product type, what free channel, what hook got traction.

Generate 5 value-first Reddit posts per day targeting subreddits where our existing products (streak apps, digital products, MCP marketplace) solve stated problems. No self-promo — pure value with profile link.
Score which posts got engagement. Feed winners back to content_factory for replication. Kill formats that get zero traction after 3 attempts.
